title: Wearable-based human flow experience recognition enhanced by transfer learning methods using emotion data.

assets.abstract: Flow experience is a specific positive and affective state that occurs when humans are completely absorbed in an activity and forget everything else. This state can lead to high performance, well-being, and productivity at work. Few studies have been conducted to determine the human flow experience using physiological wearable sensor devices. Other studies rely on self-reported data. In this article, we use physiological data collected from 25 subjects with multimodal sensing devices, in particu

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Water and pleasure — flow state, peak experience, aesthetic pleasure, reward systems, pleasure neuroscience, hedonic tone, musical pleasure.
